_publications._publicationTitle: Development of an adeno-associated virus vector for gene replacement therapy of NF1-related tumors

_contextSnippet: this vector demonstrated substantial transduction in an NF1−/− iPSC-derived neurofibroma xenograft (3MM), as shown by anti-GFP IHC. We found that AAV-K55-GFP primarily transduced the S100B-positive population
details: AAV-K55-GFP demonstrated substantial transduction in NF1 iPSC-derived neurofibroma xenograft, primarily transducing S100B-positive population
